title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open-source tool that addresses Claude Code's memory constraints by creating knowledge graphs from large codebases without requiring RAG. It reduces token overhead and improves response accuracy by organizing code information into graph structures that LLMs can reference more efficiently.
